_comment: Example Buddy AI config. Copy to 'buddy_config.json' and edit. The installer writes this file with your chosen locations. Every key is optional; anything omitted falls back to a built-in default. Search order: BUDDY_CONFIG env var, then next to a component, then the component's parent folder, then the OS-standard location (%LOCALAPPDATA%\BuddyAI on Windows, $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/buddyai on Linux).
_brain_url_note: Where the COMPANION reaches the brain. Leave as localhost for an all-in-one machine. On a companion-only / remote machine, set this to the brain host, e.g. 'http://BRAIN-HOST-OR-IP:8766' or a tunnel DNS name like 'https://buddy.example.com'. The principle is the same either way: point it at the endpoint and it connects.
